name: paralegals in law firms processing 10-20 legal documents/week tool
description: For paralegals in law firms processing 10-20 legal documents/week, inefficient formatting causes delays in court submissions. We automate formatting instead of manual formatting of legal documents using word processors.
target_audience: paralegals in law firms processing 10-20 legal documents/week
problem_solved: Formatting legal documents for court filings is time-consuming and prone to errors.
features: template selection for different court documents
